title: Select Month as calendar dropdown
excerpt: In the date column, I can drop down to quickly select a year. Is there a way to also pick a month? Currently, I have to pick a year and then click left or right multiple times to get to the right month. I have to do this…

posts.author: TanyaB (Tanya B)
posts.cookedHtml: In the date column, I can drop down to quickly select a year. Is there a way to also pick a month? Currently, I have to pick a year and then click left or right multiple times to get to the right month. I have to do this 30 times in a row and it gets very tedious

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tanya,

The Date column is one that we are currently working on improving! You can see that this is being addressed in the existing feature request here → Enter date versus scrolling to find date on date picker. The goal is to create a more intuitive, convenient and seamless experience when inputting the date - good things to come!
